channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Treasury warns Johannesburg may lose funding amid deepening financial crisis
item.description: Johannesburg’s worsening financial position has come under sharp scrutiny after Finance Minister Enoch Godongwana sent a strongly worded letter to Mayor Dada Morero, warning that the city could lose i...

item.title: AI-generated crocodile video sparks confusion after heavy rains in Nelson Mandela Bay
item.description: After heavy rainfall battered parts of Nelson Mandela Bay, including Kariega, Gqeberha and Jeffreys Bay, residents were briefly thrown into a panic by viral social media posts claiming a crocodile was...

item.title: Treasury outlines reforms to superannuation rules to support emerging investments
item.description: The Australian Treasury has proposed a major revamp of the superannuation performance test, aiming to encourage investment in emerging asset classes such as start-ups, renewable energy projects, and s...

item.title: Status of Iran-US Ceasefire Under Trump Administration
item.description: The article likely discusses the state of the ceasefire between the United States and Iran that was implemented during Donald Trump's presidency. While specific details are not accessible, the origina...

item.title: Crystal Palace Beat Shakhtar 5-2 on Aggregate to Reach Conference League Final
item.description: Crystal Palace don make history as dem qualify for dia first-ever European final afta dem defeat Shakhtar Donetsk 5-2 on aggregate for UEFA Conference League semi-final. Di Eagles already dey ahead 3-...

item.title: Tanzania Government Unveils 2.394 Trillion/- Budget Focusing on Education Reforms
item.description: Dodoma — The Minister for Education, Science and Technology, Prof Adolf Mkenda, has asked Parliament to approve a total budget of 2.394 trillion/- for the 2026/27 financial year. The budget is aimed a...

item.title: Understanding African Intellectual Thought Through Contemporary Francophone Thinkers
item.description: This article explores the perspectives of seven Francophone intellectuals on the contemporary African intellectual condition. It highlights how African thinkers navigate the legacies of colonialism, g...

item.title: Laval Police Seize Firearm from Driver Caught Exceeding Speed Limit
item.description: Laval police reported that a 31-year-old man was stopped after being caught driving at twice the posted speed limit. Officers discovered a firearm inside the vehicle, which was subsequently seized. Au...

item.title: West Bengal Class 10 Results 2026: Access Issues for Marksheet and Updates
item.description: The official website for West Bengal Madhyamik (Class 10) results 2026 is currently inaccessible, and students are unable to download their mark sheets or check live updates. The error message indicat...

item.title: Ilocos Norte Tobacco Farmers Struggle as Falling Prices Increase Debt
item.description: In Ilocos Norte, tobacco farmers are facing financial strain due to declining market prices and high production costs. Farmers like Cleto Masian and Arsenio Valencia have stopped harvesting mature Vir...

item.title: Pakistan Works with US, Singapore, and Iran to Secure Safe Return of Seafarers
item.description: Deputy Prime Minister and Foreign Minister Ishaq Dar has confirmed that Pakistan is actively coordinating with the United States and other international stakeholders to ensure the safe return of 11 Pa...

item.title: Group Calls for Transparency Over Billions Spent on Nigeria’s Refinery Repairs
item.description: One coalition wey dey push for reform and accountability for Nigeria oil sector don call out NNPCL make dem explain how over $3.5 billion wey dem say dem spend on refinery rehabilitation take go. Dem ...

item.title: Analysis of Proposed Capital Gains Tax Changes and Their Impact on Young Australians
item.description: In the lead-up to the federal Budget, Treasurer Jim Chalmers has proposed hikes to capital gains tax (CGT) across all asset classes, claiming it promotes intergenerational equity. Mark Humphery-Jenner...

item.title: Researchers Warn of Increasingly Complex and Toxic Drug Supply in Calgary
item.description: Recent research from the University of Calgary has identified a growing variety of substances in the city's illicit drug supply, with some samples containing up to 11 different compounds. These includ...

item.title: Esther Kazungu Shares Details of Disputes with Her House Helps
item.description: Kenyan comedian and digital content creator Esther Kazungu sparked online chatter after sharing leaked WhatsApp chats with her house help. In the messages, her house help accused Esther of being disre...

item.title: Kenyan Construction Workers Detained in Libya for Over Six Weeks Amid Recruitment Issues
item.description: Eight Kenyan men seeking construction jobs in Benghazi, Libya, have been held in detention for more than six weeks, leaving their families anxious and desperate for help from the Kenyan government. Th...

item.title: Authorities launch rescue operation for hikers trapped by Mount Dukono eruption
item.description: Indonesian authorities have initiated an urgent rescue operation for at least 20 hikers stranded by a sudden eruption of Mount Dukono on Halmahera Island. Among those trapped are several foreign natio...

item.title: Vaazha 2 Becomes Fourth-Highest-Grossing Malayalam Film Worldwide
item.description: The Malayalam film 'Vaazha 2' has reached a major milestone at the worldwide box office. Released on April 2, the film, directed by Savin SA and produced by Vipin Das, Harris Desom, Sahu Garapati, PB ...

item.title: House of Reps Chief Whip backs APC consensus candidate in Gombe
item.description: Hon. Bello Usman Kumo, wey be Chief Whip for House of Representatives, don officially drop him governorship ambition for Gombe State ahead of 2027 elections. Kumo don throw him support behind Dr. Jami...
